Tests the behavior of `Math.floor` with negative zero in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.floor` function when applied to negative zero. The assertion verifies that dividing 1 by the result of `Math.floor(-0)` yields `-Infinity`. This test ensures that the JavaScript engine correctly handles the edge case of negative zero in mathematical operations, specifically in the context of the `Math.floor` function. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical behavior in JavaScript.
